changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Add unique partial index on user_auth_provider(provider, provider_email) to enforce K4 at DB level. Uses a partial index (WHERE provider_email IS NOT NULL) to allow null provider_email on LOCAL rows.

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Add documentation for the unique index on user_auth_provider.
changeSet.sql: COMMENT ON INDEX idx_user_auth_provider_provider_email_unique IS 'Ensures each (provider, provider_email) combination is unique across users (defense-in-depth for K4 link check). Partial index excludes NULL provider_email rows (LOCAL provider backfill).';
